---
name: App Request
about: Suggest a new app or propose changes to an existing one
title: '[APP]: '
labels: ["App Request"]
---

## Request type
- [ ] New App Addition
- [ ] Update Existing App

## 1. App details
- **App name:**
- **Website/Store link:**
- **Brief description:**

## 2. Classification & Data
*If requesting an update, indicate which fields are changing:*

- **Categories:** (Symbol Boards, Visual Schedules, etc.)
- **Platforms:** (iOS, Android, Web, etc.)
- **Languages supported:**
- **Price type:** (Free, Paid, Subscription)

## 3. Evaluation criteria (For new apps or review)
*Based on our 1-5 rating scale:*
- **Ease of Use:** (1: Complex - 5: Intuitive)
- **Cognitive Load:** (1: Relaxing - 5: Learning)
- **Sensory Load:** (1: Low - 5: High)

## 4. Motivation
*Why should this app be added? Or, what is the reason for the requested information change?*
